name: Grilled Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the meat in beer until it is well covered, at least overnight, or longer.
2. Start a fire on the grill.
3. Rub the lemon pepper seasoning on all sides of the meat, including any cavities and creases.
4. Cook the meat on the grill until it reaches the desired doneness. This method can be used for ribs, roasts, or chops.
5. Alternatively, you may use Cider's (a type of spice blend) instead of lemon-pepper seasoning.
